label: legit
note: OCR-text form of REAL, legitimate messages — deliberately including ones that contain scam-adjacent keywords (OTP, KYC, payment, courier) to measure FALSE POSITIVES and exercise the calibration layer.

samples.ocrText: 123456 is your OTP for HDFC Bank NetBanking login. Do not share it with anyone. Valid for 10 minutes. -HDFC Bank
Rs.2,500.00 debited from A/c XX1234 on 03-06-26 to UPI/merchant grocery. Avl Bal Rs.12,300.00. Not you? Call 18004253800. -SBI
Your Amazon package will be delivered today by 9 PM. Track your order at amazon.in/your-orders. No action needed.
Order #FK1029 confirmed. Amount paid Rs 1,299 via UPI. Estimated delivery 6 June. Thank you for shopping on Flipkart.
Aapka OTP 884512 hai ICICI NetBanking ke liye. Ise kisi ke saath share na karein. 10 minute tak valid. -ICICI
Dear customer, as per RBI guidelines please update your KYC at your nearest SBI branch by 30 June 2026. Carry valid ID. -SBI
Your Blue Dart shipment AWB 12345678 is out for delivery and will arrive today. No payment required.
You paid Rs 499 to Spotify India. UPI transaction ID 412345678901. Completed. -Google Pay
